title: Map Icons
description: A Resource Pack That Adds 16 New Icons to Maps
body:
Map Icons is a Vanilla+ resource pack that uses a often forgotten about feature where right clicking a banner with a map adds it as an icon. This pack retextures those icons to be more useful.

![A chart that shows what banners give what icons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7fb418f7865a798fe6a6b5b34a47efded5c95ce.png)

Renaming a banner in an anvil before you place it will give the icon a name.

![map naming example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ee7d880ca3139d77c4a8c9f33359dc92696d6d9.png)
